§6Osmiridium§f is an alloy of osmium and iridium with §bexceptional hardness§f.

§eObtaining:§f
• Alloying osmium and iridium
• Requires advanced metallurgy setup

§eUses:§f
• High-tier components requiring extreme durability
• §bWelded Osmiridium Plate§f production
• End-game machinery construction

§eTip:§f Save for recipes specifically requiring Osmiridium - its hardness is needed for specific applications.
